profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Xolare RCR Energy TBK engages in asphalt trading in Indonesia. It operates through two segments, Asphalt and Construction. The company distributes penetration grade asphalt/bitumen under the XOLABIT brand name; and offers customized solutions for various types of emulsified asphalt, polymer modified asphalt, natural rubber modified asphalt, coldmix, waterproofing, and asphalt paint. It also offers engineering, procurement, and construction services for gas steam, biomass, and solar PV power plants; installation, testing, and commissioning services; construction services for switchyard and substations, industrial buildings, and pipelines; and mechanical and electrical construction services, as well constructs and supplies gas, oil, and biomass fired boilers; and heat recovery steam generators. In addition, the company is involved in asphalt processing; and construction of civil road infrastructure. The company was formerly known as PT. RCR Energy Indonesia and changed its name to PT Xolare RCR Energy TBK in January 2022. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Xolare RCR Energy TBK operates as a subsidiary of PT Energi Hijau Investama.
